text:
The Egyptian Olympic teamis set to face off against Uzbekistan on Saturday in the second round of the group stage in the football competitionat the Paris 2024 Olympics.

The match will start at 6:00 pm Cairo time, 3:00 pm Greenwich Mean Time at La Beaujoire stadium in Saint-Etienne.

The Egyptian Olympic team enters the match aiming to achieve its first victory in the Olympic tournament after falling into a goalless draw against Dominican Republic in the first round.

The Uzbekistan team is also looking forward to achieve positive results after losing in the last round to Spain 1-2.

The Qatari beIN Sports network owns the rights to broadcast the Egypt-Uzbekistan match at the Paris 2024 Olympics, and the match will be broadcast on beIN Sports HD 2 and beIN Sports Connect.

The match can also be watched on the following channels around the world:
title: Where and when to watch Egypt vs. Uzbekistan at the Paris Olympics - Egypt Independent
author: Egypt Independent
description: The Egyptian Olympic team is set to face off against Uzbekistan on Saturday in the second round of the group stage in the football competition at the Paris 2024 Olympics.
